allow: PowerShell($psql = "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\16\\bin\\psql.exe"; $env:PGPASSWORD = "elets_password"; Write-Output "=== enum types present now ==="; & $psql -U elets -h localhost -p 5432 -d elets_transcripts -t -c "SELECT typname FROM pg_type WHERE typname IN \('processing_status','user_role','export_status'\);"; Write-Output "=== tables present ==="; & $psql -U elets -h localhost -p 5432 -d elets_transcripts -t -c "SELECT tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname='public';"; Write-Output "=== alembic_version ==="; & $psql -U elets -h localhost -p 5432 -d elets_transcripts -t -c "SELECT version_num FROM alembic_version;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== services ==="; Get-Service Elets-Redis,Elets-Worker,Elets-API -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Status, StartType | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "=== full install log ==="; Get-Content "C:\\Users\\User.DESKTOP-TARKBTO\\Projects\\exhibitor\\tools\\install-services.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "=== ports ==="; "6379 listeners: " + \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 6379 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count; "8000 listeners: " + \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== who owns port 8000 ==="; $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "PID $\($_.OwningProcess\)  $\($p.Name\)  started $\($p.StartTime\)" } }; Write-Output "=== Elets-API err log tail ==="; Get-Content "C:\\Users\\User.DESKTOP-TARKBTO\\Projects\\exhibitor\\tools\\logs\\Elets-API.err.log" -Tail 15 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($script = "C:\\Users\\User.DESKTOP-TARKBTO\\Projects\\exhibitor\\tools\\restart-services.ps1"; Write-Output "Launching elevated reconcile \(approve the UAC prompt\)..."; Start-Process powershell -Verb RunAs -ArgumentList "-NoProfile","-ExecutionPolicy","Bypass","-File",$script)
